projects: Product Manager with 8+ years building EdTech and SaaS platforms in regulated environments. Expanded an LMS/SIS platform from 1 to 8
states, driving 40% market growth. Led cloud migrations, payments integrations, and compliance initiatives for platforms serving 300k+
Expanded LMS and SIS platform from Florida to 8 states by defining compliance requirements for FERPA, state reporting standards, and
Defined requirements for per student and per seat billing system in partnership with sales and engineering; accurate license tracking
Owned backlog and roadmap for a cloud based education platform serving 300k+ users across 1,800 schools; shipped 14 releases with 40%
Led requirements and validation for on prem to hybrid cloud migration (Azure), improving system response time 35% and reducing
Defined integration requirements for payment gateway and vendor management system; streamlined invoice processing reduced payment
Delivered a secure learning platform for Department of Justice juvenile detention facilities, enabling continued education for 2500+ students
experienceHighlights: Product Manager
Florida Virtual School Orlando FL (Remote) Nov 2023 – Present

experienceHighlights: Machine Learning Intern · Istudio Technologies · Aug 2025 – Jan 2026 | Remote
•Situation/Task: Tasked with delivering complete ML workflows on raw structured datasets — from
ingestion through to evaluation — independently within a live, shared team codebase.

evaluation; applied GridSearchCV with stratified k-fold cross-validation across multiple estimators, achieving
a 15% accuracy improvement through disciplined hyperparameter tuning.
